name: Follie
description: Follie, the merry, macabre Shadowgrapher, brings ink to life. Support her squad and control enemy crowds with a myriad of versatile sketches and tricks.

abilities.name: Forced Perspective
abilities.description: Drop through an inky frame and emerge invulnerable at the aimed location in a splash of ink that inflicts Inkblot on nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Shadowgraph
abilities.description:
Bring shadowgraphs from Follie's sketchbook to life as items that can be used for tactical advantage. Shadowgraphs splash Inkblot onto nearby enemies when created.

HOLD to open the Shadowgraph gear wheel.

abilities.name: Self Portrait
abilities.description: Draw an ink effigy to absorb the damage dealt to Follie and allies. Below, a pool of ink spreads Inkblot. Kill enemies inside the pool to grow Follie's effigy and its ink puddle.

abilities.name: Plein Air
abilities.description: Tie nearby enemies to floating balloons that douse them with Inkblot. Pop the balloons to send them crashing to the ground, splashing damage on nearby enemies.

languages.description: Follie, der fröhliche und makabre Schattenmacher, erweckt Tinte zum Leben. Unterstütze ihr Team und kontrolliere feindliche Horden mit einer Vielzahl vielseitiger Skizzen und Tricks.
languages.name: Follie

languages.description: Follie, la joyeuse Ombromane macabre, donne vie à l'encre. Soutenez son escouade et contrôlez vos ennemis grâce à une multitude de croquis et de subterfuges.
languages.name: Follie

languages.description: Follie, l'allegra e macabra Artista delle Ombre, dà vita all'inchiostro. Supporta la sua squadra e controlla le orde nemiche con una miriade di bozzetti e versatili trucchi.
languages.name: Follie

languages.description: 명랑하면서도 기괴한 그림자 화가, 폴리는 잉크에 생명을 불어넣습니다. 폴리는 분대를 지원하며 다양하고 다채로운 스케치와 기술들로 적 무리를 제어합니다.
languages.name: 폴리

languages.description: Follie, la alegre y macabra Grafista de Sombras, le da vida a la tinta. Apoya a tu escuadrón y controla a las hordas enemigas con una gran variedad de bocetos y trucos versátiles.
languages.name: Follie

languages.description: 欢愉而可怕的绘影者 Follie 赋予墨水生命。她能通过千变万化的素描与戏法来支援小队，并控制敌群。
languages.name: Follie

languages.description: Весёлая, зловещая Тенеграф Фолли вдыхает в чернила жизнь. Поддерживает свой отряд и контролирует толпы врагов с помощью множества универсальных набросков и приёмов.
languages.name: Фолли

languages.description: 陽気で不気味な影絵師「Follie」はインクに命を吹き込む。彼女のスケッチとトリックは仲間をサポートしつつクラウドコントロールもでき汎用性に優れている。
languages.name: Follie

languages.description: Follie, wesoła, makabryczna Maestra Cienia ożywia tusz. Wspiera swoją drużynę i kontroluje tłumy wrogów za pomocą niezliczonych, wszechstronnych szkiców i sztuczek.
languages.name: Follie

languages.description: Follie, a alegre e macabra Artífice das Sombras, dá vida à tinta. Apoie seu esquadrão e controle multidões de inimigos com uma infinidade de esboços e truques versáteis.
languages.name: Follie

languages.description: 歡愉而陰森的摹影者 Follie 賦予墨水生命。她能透過無數多變的素描與戲法來支援隊友，並控制成群的敵人。
languages.name: Follie

languages.description: Follie คือนักสร้างเงาสุดร่าเริงและลึกลับที่จะเนรมิตหมึกให้มีชีวิตชีวา ซึ่งจะคอยสนับสนุนทีมและควบคุมฝูงศัตรูด้วยภาพวาดพร้อมลูกเล่นมากมายหลากหลายรูปแบบ
languages.name: Follie

languages.description: Neşeli ve ürkütücü Hayalbaz Follie, mürekkebi hayata geçiriyor. Çok yönlü çizimleri ve numaralarıyla takımını destekleyebilir ve aynı zamanda düşman kalabalıklarını kontrol edebilir.
languages.name: Follie

languages.description: Весела й моторошна тіньописиця Фоллі вдихає в чорнило життя. Вона підтримує свій загін і контролює натовпи ворогів за допомогою безлічі універсальних нарисів і трюків.
languages.name: Фоллі
